name: LoadNinja (SmartBear)
description: LoadNinja (SmartBear) — In-browser load testing platform that uses real browsers to simulate concurrent user load.

seo.title: LoadNinja (SmartBear) — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: LoadNinja (SmartBear): LoadNinja (SmartBear) — In-browser load testing platform that uses real browsers to simulate concurrent user load.

when_to_use: Real browser-based load testing without JavaScript emulation
Record user journeys and replay at 1000+ concurrent users
CSS/JS execution included in load simulation accuracy
Integration with ReadyAPI for end-to-end performance gates

pros: Real browsers avoid protocol-level fidelity issues
Good for UI-heavy SPA load tests
cons: Real browsers cost much more compute
Less scriptable than k6 or JMeter
review.verdict: Justifies its price only when protocol-level tools cannot simulate your complex SPA traffic.
review.best_for: Enterprises load-testing heavy SPAs where browser fidelity matters
review.not_for: API or microservice load tests where k6 and Gatling are cheaper

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
